name: pyGecko
description: Open-source Python library for parsing, processing, and analysis of GC-MS and GC-FID raw data. Enables calibration-free quantification and automated analysis of 96-reaction arrays in under a minute.

name: PAYN
description: Positivity is All You Need — Framework for augmentation of reliable negatives from biased organic datasets. Addresses the challenge of negative data in chemical machine learning.

name: GPUma
description: Minimalistic geometry optimizer for molecules using UMA MLIP models. Supports single structure and batch optimization, both sequential and in parallel batches on GPUs.

name: InvEnT
description: Inverse photocatalyst design using machine learning. Enables the computational discovery and optimization of photocatalysts for energy transfer catalysis.

name: EnTdecker
description: EnTdecker – A Machine Learning-Based Platform for Guiding Substrate Discovery in Energy Transfer Catalysis.

name: Standardizing Substrate Selection
description: Standardizing Substrate Selection: A Strategy toward Unbiased Evaluation of Reaction Generality.

name: EasyChemML
description: EasyChem-ML is a modular structure-based machine learning tool for property, reactivity and structure prediction in (organic) chemistry.
